summary: Tested multi-language support (EN/HI/MR) on Mumbai Care Clinic landing page. All language switching features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language i18n fully working. All 3 languages (EN/HI/MR) switch correctly. localStorage persistence verified. Mobile language switcher (globe icon) works without needing to open hamburger menu. Form labels, footer, nav all translate. data-testid attributes: language-switcher-btn (desktop), mobile-language-btn (mobile), lang-option-en/hi/mr.

test_results.language_switcher_visible: PASS - Globe icon with EN/HI/MR code visible in header
test_results.dropdown_shows_3_options: PASS - English, Hindi, Marathi options visible
test_results.hindi_translation: PASS - Hero, nav, CTAs, form labels all translate to Hindi
test_results.localStorage_persistence: PASS - clinic_lang key stores language, survives page reload
test_results.mobile_language_switcher: PASS - Globe icon accessible without hamburger, dropdown shows correctly
test_results.form_labels_translation: PASS - All 5 form labels translated in Hindi
test_results.footer_translation: PASS - Footer quick links and content translated
